go.reason: Go implementation must start from the latest stable toolchain, not the older local toolchain.

nonLatestSelectedDependencyPolicy.summary: No Go runtime dependency is intentionally selected below its latest observed stable/tagged release in this baseline. Exceptions below capture local toolchain command availability and pre-v1 stability risk that has been proof-gated on Windows.

records.fallbackVersion: go1.25.7 local only; not approved for Go module work
records.failureReason: Local machine currently exposes go1.25.7, older than the selected latest stable toolchain.
records.mitigation: Install or activate go1.26.3 before creating the Go module and before running any Go proof/test.

records.failureReason: Latest tagged Go binding is pre-v1.
records.mitigation: Windows load/read proof passed in go-ladybugdb-windows-proof.json; broad analyzer persistence work may proceed from the proofed integration path.

records.failureReason: No fallback required after the Windows parser proof.
records.mitigation: Windows parser proof passed in go-tree-sitter-windows-proof.json.

selectedGoRuntimeDependencies.evidence: GitHub latest release and go get github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-go/bindings/go@v0.25.0

selectedGoRuntimeDependencies.stabilityNote: Latest tagged Go binding is pre-v1; Phase 1 Windows load/read proof passed in go-ladybugdb-windows-proof.json.

fallbacksOrExceptions.issue: Local machine currently has go1.25.7, while selected latest stable is go1.26.3.
fallbacksOrExceptions.mitigation: Install or activate go1.26.3 before creating the Go module and before running any Go proof/test.

fallbacksOrExceptions.issue: Go binding latest tagged release is pre-v1.
fallbacksOrExceptions.mitigation: Pin v0.13.1 and use the native LadybugDB v0.16.1 Windows runtime path proven by go-ladybugdb-windows-proof.json.

fallbacksOrExceptions.issue: Grammar modules must be pinned from proofed Go imports rather than inferred from npm package names.
fallbacksOrExceptions.mitigation: Pin github.com/tree-sitter/go-tree-sitter v0.25.0 and github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-go v0.25.0 as proven by go-tree-sitter-windows-proof.json.
